items.title: NIT-T’s CEDI signs MoU with gem export promotion council for jewellery joint venture
items.summary: JewelStart, a dedicated gem and jewellery incubation hub, will be established at NIT Tiruchi to support innovation, entrepreneurship, and technology-driven growth in the gem and jewellery sector

items.title: Animal Husbandry Department to intensify digital tagging of cows and buffaloes in Tiruchi district
items.summary: Database of the animals to be created with the assignment of 12 digit identification number; staff of Animal Husbandry Department to visit villages for enumeration

items.title: New ATC tower at Tiruchi airport to get commissioned by June next year
items.summary: NoC has been obtained for increasing the height of the tower to 53 metres; Tiruchi airport clocked high growth in aircraft movement and international passenger traffic in 12 years

items.title: Start-up demonstrates facade cleaning drone at NIT-T
items.summary: The machine is a hexacopter-based drone equipped with six high-performance motors, each capable of generating up to 15 kg of thrust, can rise up to a height of 100 metres

items.title: Woman kills three-month-old daughter before ending own life in Chennai
items.summary: Preliminary inquiries by the police revealed that Dharini had been undergoing treatment for depression since childhood and that her condition had deteriorated after the birth of her daughter

items.summary: For a start, the initiative has been taken up at the Alandur Metro Rail station, where 25 cadets created awareness among passengers during peak hours in the last two days.

items.title: Understanding khayal, a form of Hindustani classical music, and its secret masters
items.summary: Sumana Ramanan’s book The Secret Master profiles Arun Kashalkar’s Kkhayal journey, exploring classical music’s marginalizsed ecosystem. At a discussion with TM Krishna in Chennai, she spoke about the commodification and cultural shifts threatening Hindustani music, urging institutional support for gurus and more performance spaces
